identity.name: E1
identity.mission: Create a clinical SaaS interface that balances sterile precision with human warmth. Reject generic 'Bootstrap Medical' templates.
core_principles: Fusion: Swiss Precision x Organic Warmth
Content First: Patient data is the hero, UI is the frame
Zoom In: High-fidelity details on charts and teeth
Negative Space: Reduce cognitive load for busy doctors

usage_rules: Use tabular-nums for all clinical data and phone numbers.
Headings should be Dark Slate (Light Mode) or Off-White (Dark Mode), never pure black.

grid_system.dashboard_bento: Use flex-wrap with percentage widths (48% / 100%) for mobile bento grid.

primary.style: bg-primary rounded-full px-6 py-3 shadow-lg active:scale-95 transition-transform

cards.style: bg-surface rounded-xl border border-border shadow-sm p-4
cards.dashboard_stat: flex-1 min-w-[45%] bg-surface p-4 rounded-2xl border border-slate-100 shadow-[0_2px_8px_rgba(0,0,0,0.04)]

inputs.style: bg-background border border-border rounded-lg px-4 py-3 text-main mb-4 focus:border-primary

tab_bar.style: bg-surface/90 border-t border-border absolute bottom-0 w-full h-20 pb-5 pt-3 flex-row justify-around items-center backdrop-blur-lg

icons.library: Lucide React Native or Expo Vector Icons

ai_agent.pulse: Infinite ease-in-out opacity loop (0.5 to 1.0) for the AI status indicator

accessibility.contrast: Text must satisfy APCA Lc 60+ on backgrounds.
accessibility.touch_targets: Minimum 44x44 points for all interactive elements.
accessibility.text_scaling: All Text components must allow font scaling (do not fix maxFontSizeMultiplier unless absolutely necessary for layout).

tech_specifics.styling_strategy: StyleSheet or NativeWind (if available). If using StyleSheet, mimic Tailwind class names in variable names (e.g., styles.p_4).
tech_specifics.safe_area_handling: Always wrap screen content in SafeAreaView or use useSafeAreaInsets for padding.

instructions_to_main_agent.1: Implement the Authentication flow first using the 'auth_hero' image as a background with a dark overlay.
instructions_to_main_agent.2: Build the Dashboard with the 'Bento' grid layout for stats (Appointments, AI Status, Revenue).
instructions_to_main_agent.3: The AI Agent Toggle must be the most prominent interaction on the dashboard. Use the 'ai_active' purple color when ON.
instructions_to_main_agent.4: Use the 'doctor_consult' image for the Patient Details profile header.
instructions_to_main_agent.5: Ensure all lists (Appointments, Patients) are rendered using FlatList for performance.
instructions_to_main_agent.6: Use 'Manrope' for all Headings (H1-H3) and 'Inter' for body text. Load these fonts via expo-font.
instructions_to_main_agent.8: Mock data should be realistic Indian names and contexts (e.g., 'Dr. Sharma', 'Aarav Patel', 'Root Canal').

universal_guidelines.anti_slop: Avoid generic centered layouts. Use asymmetry where possible. Add texture/noise to solid backgrounds if performance allows.
universal_guidelines.micro_interactions: Buttons must provide feedback on press. Lists should fade in.
universal_guidelines.data_test_ids: All interactive elements must have testID prop for testing.
